metadata.evaluation_name: PRMP Corrected Regime Analysis, Statistical Significance, and Mechanism Investigation
metadata.description: Rigorous re-evaluation of PRMP results removing confounds (degenerate R²=1.0, parent_dim=1), testing statistical significance via bootstrap, and investigating mechanisms (information filtering, implicit regularization, gradient enrichment).
blocks: Block 2: Statistical Significance of Amazon PRMP Improvement
Block 4: Revised Mechanism Score and Visualizations

sensitivity_analysis.no_degenerate_no_dim1_note: N=0 for rel-stack alone: all links are either degenerate or parent_dim=1

detailed_gradient_enrichment.interpretation: ~41% of PRMP improvement from extra params/architecture, ~59% from learned predictions

anomaly_analysis.interpretation: CONSISTENT with predictability theory (higher R² → more improvement) but INCONSISTENT with cardinality theory (higher cardinality does NOT → more improvement)

examples.output: {"verdict": "PARTIAL", "evidence": "Amazon: yes (7.6% RMSE improvement). rel-hm: ceiling effect (all variants >0.96 AUROC). rel-stack: proxy task (cross-table prediction), not end-to-end GNN."}

{"verdict": "NOT SUPPORTED", "evidence": "Amazon: customer-only (card=4.6) beats product-only (card=14.7) despite lower cardinality. Original rho=-0.85 from exp_id3 was confounded by 2 degenerate R\u00b2=1.0 links and 7 parent_dim=1 links. After cleaning, only N=4 valid links remain \u2014 insufficient for significance."}
{"verdict": "SUPPORTED", "evidence": "Amazon: random_pred RMSE=0.560 vs PRMP RMSE=0.534. Learned predictions account for ~60% of total improvement."}

{"verdict": "NOT SUPPORTED", "evidence": "Both Amazon FK links have residual_ratio >1 (product: 1.88, customer: 2.29). Filtering efficiency is NEGATIVE (-0.88, -1.29). PRMP prediction MLPs INCREASE rather than decrease feature variance."}
{"verdict": "NOT SUPPORTED", "evidence": "PRMP gen_gap=0.0551 vs standard gen_gap=0.0388. PRMP shows MORE overfitting."}
{"verdict": "PARTIAL", "evidence": "~41% of gain from extra params alone (random_pred ablation). Remaining ~59% requires learned predictions, confirming both architecture and learning contribute."}
